# Roles whose CI matrix entry should include the `minimal` variant
# (vanilla Ubuntu cloud image: ext4, snapd + cloud-init preinstalled)
# on top of the default `box` (debootstrap'd ZFS rpool).
#
# Read by mise-tasks/ci/detect-roles. One role per line; comments +
# blank lines OK. Add roles here when behaviour genuinely differs
# against a host where the upstream-shipped packages it
# removes/replaces are actually present — e.g. cleanup exercises the
# snap-removal path only when snapd was preinstalled.

cleanup
